overview.what: A comprehensive personal finance application that helps users manage income and expenses. It features monthly summaries by category and allows users to export their transaction data as CSV files for external analysis.
overview.how_it_works: Transactions are stored in an SQLite database. The backend uses SQL aggregation queries to calculate category totals for the frontend. The CSV export is handled by `PapaParse` on the client-side to transform the JSON response into a downloadable file.
what_you_learn: Writing SQL aggregate queries (SUM, GROUP BY)
Implementing file exports in web apps

files.description: Frontend component for data export and visualization.
